description: Hezbollah (Party of God) is a Lebanese Shia Islamist political party and militant group founded with the support of Iran's [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) during the Lebanese Civil War. It is the most powerful of Iran's regional proxies and receives extensive financial, military, and logistical support from the [IRGC Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force). It operates as both a political party in Lebanese parliament and a military force with an arsenal that surpasses the Lebanese Armed Forces.
editorial_notes: Primary Iranian proxy in the Levant.
